post.summary: Attempt to authenticate a new session

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.summary: Authenticate the request for channel access
Return a PNG QR code that links to the restaurant's public menu scoped to this table

get.description:
Returns the alphabetically-sorted set of icon names that the frontend
can reference via `<use href="/menu-sprite.svg#<name>"/>`. Names are
stable identifiers; clients should treat them as opaque strings.

get.summary:
List the menu(s) for a restaurant. After the multi-menu collapse, every
restaurant has at most one menu — the response is a collection of 0 or 1

post.summary: Create a new menu for a restaurant

get.summary: Return a full menu tree: sections → items → option groups → options (with translations)
Search menu items across all translations

post.description:
Default is async: returns `202 Accepted` with `data.id = <uuid>` and
`data.attributes.status = "pending"`. The caller then polls
`GET /v1/menu-analyses/{uuid}` until the status reaches a terminal value —
there is no webhook or push channel.

Pass `sync=1` to run the analysis inline (useful for dev/testing) — the
request blocks until the LLM cascade returns and responds `200` with the
full menu inline. Can take tens of seconds to minutes; not recommended
from a UI.
post.summary: Upload menu photos and start (or run inline) an analysis

get.description:
Call this every 2–3 seconds after a 202 response from `POST /v1/menu-analyses`
until `data.attributes.status` reaches a terminal value. There is no webhook or
push channel — polling is the only mechanism to learn that the menu is ready.

Status lifecycle: `pending` → `processing` → `completed` | `failed`.
On `completed`: `attributes.menu`, `saved_menu_id`, `saved_restaurant_id`, `item_count`.
On `failed`: `attributes.error_message`.
get.summary: Poll an async menu analysis by UUID

post.summary: Create an item in a section

put.summary: Bulk reorder items within a section

post.summary:
Duplicate an item: copies attributes + translations and reuses the same
variation/add-on pivot attachments. The source-locale name gets a "(копия)"
marker. Returns the new item immediately (instant copy, no editor step)
Create a section in a menu

put.summary: Bulk reorder sections within a menu

get.summary: List all locales that have translations for a menu

initial_locale.description:
The menu's one original language; identical to source_locale.
Kept for frontend compatibility (it gates create flows on this).

post.summary: Trigger translation of a menu into a target locale

message.const: Cannot translate into the source locale.

get.summary:
List a menu's top-level modifier groups (the library), each with its
options and a usage count (`items_count`). Request `?include=options`
to embed the options in the JSON:API document

post.summary: Create a modifier group (Size, Extras, …) shared across the menu

delete.summary: Delete a modifier group (and, via cascade, its options and nested groups)

post.summary: Attach items to a group via the pivot (scoped to the group's own menu)

put.summary:
Update the per-item override of an attached group's selection rule
(required / min / max / hidden / order) — does NOT touch the shared
group. `null` for an override means "inherit the group's default"

post.summary:
Create an option within a group. Price meaning follows the group's
pricing_mode (absolute when replace, delta when add)

delete.summary: Delete an option (and, via cascade, any nested groups it opens)

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

post.summary: Send a reset link to the given user

get.summary:
Expose the VAPID public key so the SPA can build its applicationServerKey.
Public on purpose — it is a public key — and fetched (rather than baked into
a VITE_ var) so rotating it never requires a frontend rebuild

post.summary: Store (or refresh) the current user's push subscription

delete.summary: Remove a push subscription by endpoint (browser unsubscribed / opted out)

enum: Queued, but the user has no push subscriptions yet (enable notifications in the PWA first).

get.summary: List all restaurants owned by the authenticated user

post.summary: Create a new restaurant owned by the authenticated user

get.summary: Menus (one per restaurant) with sections and items for all owned restaurants

delete.summary: Delete a restaurant. Only the owner can delete

get.description:
The encoded URL is `{app_url}/{restaurant.id}`. A restaurant always has
at most one active menu, so the QR targets the restaurant, not a specific menu.
get.summary: Return a PNG QR code that links to the restaurant's public menu page
List all users (id + email) for the admin-only push test harness

modifier_groups.description:
Modifier groups: a 'replace' group's option price is the
ABSOLUTE base; an 'add' group's option price is a DELTA.

ModifierPricingMode.description: How a modifier group's option price composes into the line price. - Replace: the chosen option price is the ABSOLUTE unit price (replaces the    dish base). Used for a "Size" axis. A replace group is single-select.  - Add: each chosen option price is a signed DELTA added on top. Used for    "Extras". Multi-select.
ModifierPricingMode.title: ModifierPricingMode

prices.description: Size-dependent price matrix: price per driver option.

selections.description:
Recursive selection tree — shape only; ownership, cardinality and
quantity caps are enforced server-side against the menu graph in
PlaceOrderAction via OrderSelectionValidator.

UpdateItemModifierGroupRequest.description:
Per-item overrides of an attached modifier group's selection rule. Each
`*_override` is nullable — send `null` to inherit the group's own default.
UpdateItemModifierGroupRequest.title: UpdateItemModifierGroupRequest

prices.description: Size-dependent price matrix: price per driver option.

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
